question: What trends can be observed in the industry sector’s percentage of GDP over the years?

analysis.design_rationale: A heatmap provides a detailed comparison of 'Industry%ofGDP' across countries and years, visually surfacing patterns such as persistent high/low industrial sector shares, regional variations, and temporal shifts. This dense format leverages all country entries and allows users to spot clusters—countries with similar industrial patterns—or outliers, revealing actionable insights about the distribution and evolution of industrial sector importance.
analysis.target_insight: Country-level changes and consistencies in industrial sector share over time, highlighting leaders, laggards, and possible geographic/regional groupings.

chart_encodings.other_aesthetics: Viridis colormap, colorbar, tight axis arrangement

transformations: Convert df['Industry%ofGDP'] to numeric, coercing errors
Pivot DataFrame: index=df['Country/Economy'], columns=df['Year GDP '], values=df['Industry%ofGDP']
Sort countries by their average Industry%ofGDP to improve visual interpretability
suggestion.matplotlib_code:
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
import pandas as pd
import numpy as np
import matplotlib as mpl
df = pd.read_csv('csv_c_squared\1.csv')
df['Industry%ofGDP'] = pd.to_numeric(df['Industry%ofGDP'], errors='coerce')
df_heat = df.pivot(index='Country/Economy', columns='Year GDP ', values='Industry%ofGDP')
df_heat = df_heat.loc[df_heat.mean(axis=1).sort_values(ascending=False).index]
fig, ax = plt.subplots(figsize=(11,14))
cmap = mpl.colormaps['viridis']
im = ax.imshow(df_heat.values, aspect='auto', cmap=cmap, interpolation='nearest')
ax.set_xticks(np.arange(len(df_heat.columns)))
ax.set_yticks(np.arange(len(df_heat.index)))
ax.set_xticklabels(df_heat.columns, rotation=45, ha='right', fontsize=9)
ax.set_yticklabels(df_heat.index, fontsize=7)
ax.set_xlabel('Year GDP ')
ax.set_ylabel('Country/Economy')
ax.set_title('Industry Sector Percentage of GDP\nHeatmap by Country and Year', fontsize=14)
cbar = plt.colorbar(im, ax=ax, fraction=0.035, pad=0.03)
cbar.set_label('Industry%ofGDP', fontsize=12)
plt.tight_layout()
plt.show()
